body_txt: In real life, cars tend to sink in water . This, however, can be averted in fiction ( and in Real Life ). This trope applies whether a normal car can inexplicably float or work as a submarine, or a modified car can do this (more realistic). These can overlap with Cool Car , the Alleged Car , and What a Piece of Junk . Sub-Trope of We Don't Need Roads . Sister Trope to Flying Car , though making a car float on water is much easier than making it fly. Can be achieved by a Transforming Vehicle . The opposite of Ship Out of Water , although they can overlap. See also Amphibious Unit for when these appear in strategy games.
